---
title: "09. Time-Series Analysis"
---

# Time-Series Analysis {#sec-ch-09-timeseries}

Stationarity, ARIMA, exponential smoothing, state-space models, spectral analysis, and forecasting evaluation. Examples use biomedical signals â€” heart rate, glucose, EEG â€” rather than macroeconomic data.

This chapter contains **30 method pages** and **1 lab**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.Rmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [ARIMA Models](arima-models.Rmd) | `arima-models` |
| [Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test](adf-test.Rmd) | `adf-test` |
| [Bayesian Changepoint Detection](bcp-bayesian-changepoint.Rmd) | `bcp-bayesian-changepoint` |
| [Changepoint Detection](changepoint-detection.Rmd) | `changepoint-detection` |
| [Diebold-Mariano Test](diebold-mariano.Rmd) | `diebold-mariano` |
| [Differencing a Time Series](differencing.Rmd) | `differencing` |
| [ETS Models](ets-models.Rmd) | `ets-models` |
| [Exponential Smoothing](exponential-smoothing.Rmd) | `exponential-smoothing` |
| [Forecast Accuracy Metrics](forecast-accuracy-metrics.Rmd) | `forecast-accuracy-metrics` |
| [GARCH Models](garch-volatility.Rmd) | `garch-volatility` |
| [Granger Causality](granger-causality.Rmd) | `granger-causality` |
| [Holt-Winters Method](holt-winters.Rmd) | `holt-winters` |
| [Interpreting ACF and PACF](acf-pacf-interpretation.Rmd) | `acf-pacf-interpretation` |
| [KPSS Test](kpss-test.Rmd) | `kpss-test` |
| [Moving Averages](moving-averages.Rmd) | `moving-averages` |
| [Phillips-Perron Test](phillips-perron.Rmd) | `phillips-perron` |
| [Rolling-Origin Cross-Validation](rolling-origin-cv.Rmd) | `rolling-origin-cv` |
| [Seasonal ARIMA (SARIMA)](seasonal-arima.Rmd) | `seasonal-arima` |
| [Seasonal Decomposition (STL)](seasonal-decomposition-stl.Rmd) | `seasonal-decomposition-stl` |
| [Spectral Analysis](spectral-analysis.Rmd) | `spectral-analysis` |
| [State-Space Models](state-space-models.Rmd) | `state-space-models` |
| [Stationarity Tests](stationarity-tests.Rmd) | `stationarity-tests` |
| [The Kalman Filter](kalman-filter.Rmd) | `kalman-filter` |
| [The Ljung-Box Test](ljung-box.Rmd) | `ljung-box` |
| [Time Series: Introduction](time-series-introduction.Rmd) | `time-series-introduction` |
| [VECM and Cointegration](vecm-cointegration.Rmd) | `vecm-cointegration` |
| [Vector Autoregression (VAR)](multivariate-var.Rmd) | `multivariate-var` |
| [Wavelet Analysis](wavelet-analysis.Rmd) | `wavelet-analysis` |
| [White Noise Tests](white-noise-tests.Rmd) | `white-noise-tests` |
| [X-13ARIMA-SEATS Decomposition](x13-decomposition.Rmd) | `x13-decomposition` |

## Labs

| Lab |
|---|
| [Time series basics](labs/lab-time-series-basics.Rmd) |
